question: Solana Up or Down - January 19, 11AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Map Handicap: GL (-1.5) vs Aurora Gaming (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between GamerLegion and Aurora Gaming in the BLAST Bounty Qualifier, scheduled for January 17 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "GamerLegion" if GamerLegion wins 2 or more maps than Aurora Gaming in this match.

question: XRP Up or Down - January 18, 11:30AM-11:45AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Total Rounds Over/Under 51.5
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between NRG and Cloud9 in the VCT Americas Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of rounds across all maps in this match is greater than or equal to 52.

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Valorant: NRG vs Cloud9 (BO3) - VCT Americas Kickoff Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between NRG and Cloud9 in the VCT Americas Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "NRG" if NRG win the match against Cloud9.

This market will resolve to "Cloud9" if Cloud9 win the match against NRG.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/valorant/Main_Page.

question: Will Alliance win the Apex Legends Global Series 2026 Championship?
description:
This market will resolve according to which team that wins the Apex Legends Global Series 2026 Championship scheduled January 15-18, 2026.

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed team to win the Apex Legends Global Series 2026 Championship (e.g. they are mathematically eliminated), the corresponding market will resolve to "No".

Ties in standings will be broken according to the official ALGS rules. 

If the 2026 ALGS Championship cancelled, postponed after January 31, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ALGS website (https://algs.ea.com/year-5/champs-2026). However, a consensus of credible reporting (e.g., Liquipedia at https://liquipedia.net/apexlegends/Apex_Legends_Global_Series/2026/Championship) may also be used.

This market will resolve according to which team that wins the Apex Legends Global Series 2026 Championship scheduled January 15-18, 2026.

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed team to win the Apex Legends Global Series 2026 Championship (e.g. they are mathematically eliminated), the corresponding market will resolve to "No".

Ties in standings will be broken according to the official ALGS rules. 

If the 2026 ALGS Championship cancelled, postponed after January 31, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ALGS website (https://algs.ea.com/year-5/champs-2026). However, a consensus of credible reporting (e.g., Liquipedia at https://liquipedia.net/apexlegends/Apex_Legends_Global_Series/2026/Championship) may also be used.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down on January 19?
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT Jan 18 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is lower than the final "Close" price for the Jan 19 '26 12:00 ET candle.

This market will resolve to "Down" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT Jan 18 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is higher than the final "Close" price for the Jan 19 '26 12:00 ET candle.

If the final "Close" price for both of these candles is exactly equal on Binance, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 19, 12PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will Elon Musk post <40 tweets from January 19 to January 21, 2026?
description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from January 19 12:00 PM ET to January 21, 2026 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

question: Counter-Strike: megoshort vs STATE (BO3) - PLAYR Masters Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between megoshort and STATE in the PLAYR Masters Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "megoshort" if megoshort win the match against STATE.

This market will resolve to "STATE" if STATE win the match against megoshort.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

question: Counter-Strike: KOLESIE vs Metizport (BO1) - IEM Rio: Global Open Qualifier Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between KOLESIE and Metizport in the IEM Rio: Global Open Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "KOLESIE" if KOLESIE win the match against Metizport.

This market will resolve to "Metizport" if Metizport win the match against KOLESIE.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

This market will resolve according to the final "Close" price of the Binance 1 minute candle for SOL/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market will resolve according to the final "Close" price of the Binance 1 minute candle for XRP/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bucknell Bison vs. Colgate Raiders: O/U 138.5
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for January 17 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Bucknell Bison and Colgate Raiders combine to score 139 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 139, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
